nodes.label: Webcam
nodes.description: Captures live video feed from your system camera.

nodes.label: Image File
nodes.description: Loads a static image from your local drive.

nodes.label: Movie File
nodes.description: Plays a video file with playback and scrubbing controls.

nodes.label: Solid Color
nodes.description: Generates an image of a custom solid color.

nodes.label: Audio File
nodes.description: Loads an audio file (.wav, .mp3, .flac…).

nodes.label: Display
nodes.description: The output terminal displaying the final video stream.

nodes.label: Movie Export
nodes.description: Records the pipeline to an MP4 file.

nodes.label: Compose
nodes.description: Combines two images: side-by-side, split view, blend, difference, or checkerboard.

nodes.label: Note
nodes.description: Annotation text block. Double-click to edit.

nodes.label: Frame
nodes.description: Wraps and labels a group of nodes.

nodes.label: Reroute
nodes.description: Pass-through node to organize wires.

nodes.label: Group
nodes.description: Encapsulates a sub-graph into a reusable group node.

nodes.label: Group Input
nodes.description: Exposes inputs at the group boundary.

nodes.label: Group Output
nodes.description: Exposes outputs at the group boundary.

nodes.label: Gaussian Blur
nodes.description: Applies a Gaussian blur to smooth the image and reduce noise.

nodes.label: Grayscale
nodes.description: Converts the image to grayscale.

nodes.label: Threshold
nodes.description: Separates the image into black and white based on intensity.

nodes.label: Canny Edge
nodes.description: Detects edges using the Canny algorithm.

nodes.label: CLAHE
nodes.description: Improves local image contrast adaptively.

nodes.label: Bilateral Filter
nodes.description: Smoothes while preserving edge sharpness.

nodes.label: High Pass
nodes.description: Extracts fine details by subtracting a blurred version.

nodes.label: Low Pass
nodes.description: Blurs the image to suppress high-frequency noise.

nodes.label: Gaussian Noise
nodes.description: Adds synthetic Gaussian noise.

nodes.label: Salt & Pepper Noise
nodes.description: Adds synthetic salt-and-pepper noise.

nodes.label: Speckle Noise
nodes.description: Adds synthetic speckle noise.

nodes.label: Glitch
nodes.description: Applies artistic glitch / pixel-shift distortion.

nodes.label: Directional Morphology
nodes.description: Applies anisotropic morphological operations.

nodes.label: Linear Direction
nodes.description: Highlights structures aligned with a specific direction.

nodes.label: Linearity
nodes.description: Measures linear structure strength in the image.

nodes.label: Blend Images
nodes.description: Blends two images with a configurable weight.

nodes.label: Blend Modes
nodes.description: Photoshop-style blend modes (multiply, screen, overlay…).

nodes.label: Gradient
nodes.description: Computes image gradient magnitude and direction.

nodes.label: Invert
nodes.description: Inverts all pixel values (negative image).

nodes.label: Pixelate
nodes.description: Reduces resolution with a blocky pixelation effect.

nodes.label: Rotate
nodes.description: Rotates the image by an arbitrary angle.

nodes.label: Sobel Edge
nodes.description: Detects edges via Sobel gradient magnitude.

nodes.label: Shadow / Highlight
nodes.description: Adjusts shadows and highlights independently.

nodes.label: Upscale (RealESRGAN)
nodes.description: AI-powered image super-resolution.

nodes.label: Normalize
nodes.description: Normalizes pixel values to a given range.

nodes.label: Image Math
nodes.description: Per-pixel arithmetic between two images.

nodes.label: Brightness & Contrast
nodes.description: Adjusts image brightness and contrast.

nodes.label: Image Levels
nodes.description: Adjusts black point, white point and gamma.

nodes.label: Color Space
nodes.description: Converts between BGR, RGB, HSV, LAB, and other color spaces.

nodes.label: Channel Split
nodes.description: Splits an image into its individual channels.

nodes.label: Channel Merge
nodes.description: Merges separate channels back into an image.

nodes.label: Channel Formula
nodes.description: Computes a new channel from per-pixel arithmetic on input channels.

nodes.label: Colormap
nodes.description: Applies a false-color colormap to a grayscale image.

nodes.label: Colormap (Simple)
nodes.description: Maps scalar values to colors via a lookup table.

nodes.label: Flip
nodes.description: Inverts the image horizontally or vertically.

nodes.label: Resize
nodes.description: Changes the image resolution.

nodes.label: Crop
nodes.description: Interactive rectangular crop with drag handles.

nodes.label: Mask Polygon
nodes.description: Interactive polygon editor to define a region of interest mask.

nodes.label: Perspective Warp
nodes.description: Straightens a distorted area into a flat rectangle via 4 points.

nodes.label: Manual 4 Points
nodes.description: Manually defines 4 reference points for geometric calculations.

nodes.label: Affine Warp
nodes.description: Applies a 2×3 affine transformation matrix.

nodes.label: Rotate (No Crop)
nodes.description: Rotates without clipping — expands canvas to fit.

nodes.label: Auto Cropper
nodes.description: Crops around a detected object bounding box with padding.

nodes.label: Approx Polygon
nodes.description: Approximates a contour with fewer vertices (Ramer-Douglas-Peucker).

nodes.label: Fit Shape
nodes.description: Fits an ellipse or rectangle to a contour.

nodes.label: Oriented Bounding Box
nodes.description: Automatic alignment and angle correction with rotated mask output. Deskews content to its minimum-area oriented bounding box.

nodes.label: Offset
nodes.description: Translates the image by (dx, dy) pixels.

nodes.label: Color Mask
nodes.description: Creates a mask by isolating a range of colors (HSV).

nodes.label: Morphology
nodes.description: Dilation or erosion operations to clean up masks.

nodes.label: Mask Blend
nodes.description: Blends two images using a mask as an alpha layer.

nodes.label: Coord To Mask
nodes.description: Transforms detection coordinates into a white mask.

nodes.label: Circle Mask
nodes.description: Generates a circular binary mask, parametric or interactive.

nodes.label: Invert Mask
nodes.description: Flips foreground and background in a binary mask.

nodes.label: Image to Mask
nodes.description: Converts a grayscale image to a binary mask.

nodes.label: Mask to Image
nodes.description: Converts a binary mask to a grayscale image.

nodes.label: Mask Operations
nodes.description: Boolean operations between two masks (AND, OR, XOR, subtract).

nodes.label: Mask Outline
nodes.description: Extracts the boundary pixels of a mask.

nodes.label: Mask Area Filter
nodes.description: Removes blobs outside a size range from a mask.

nodes.label: Region Sealer
nodes.description: Closes gaps between mask regions to merge touching areas.

nodes.label: Float Threshold
nodes.description: Thresholds a float-valued image at a configurable level.

nodes.label: Blob Filter
nodes.description: Keeps or removes connected blobs by area, aspect ratio, or circularity.

nodes.label: Smart Morphology
nodes.description: Adaptive morphological cleaning with multiple operation modes.

nodes.label: Mask Band
nodes.description: Extracts a percentage-based band (by height or width) from an image or mask.

nodes.label: Split Half
nodes.description: Splits an image or mask into two halves along the horizontal or vertical axis.

nodes.label: Apply Mask
nodes.description: Applies a mask to an image, zeroing excluded pixels.

nodes.label: Fill Holes
nodes.description: Fills enclosed holes in a binary mask (utility variant).

nodes.label: Label Area Filter
nodes.description: Filters a label map by region area range.

nodes.label: Points to Mask
nodes.description: Draws a filled polygon from a list of points.

nodes.label: Mask to SVG
nodes.description: Converts a binary mask to SVG path data.

nodes.label: Annotator
nodes.description: Interactive drawing layer: brush, lines, circles, and text directly over the image.

nodes.label: Draw Overlay
nodes.description: Draws shapes and text over the main video stream.

nodes.label: Tint Mask
nodes.description: Transparent colorization of a masked region with a color picker and configurable opacity.

nodes.label: Draw Rect
nodes.description: Draws a rectangle on the image.

nodes.label: Draw Ellipse
nodes.description: Draws an ellipse on the image.

nodes.label: Draw Line
nodes.description: Draws a line segment on the image.

nodes.label: Draw Point
nodes.description: Draws a point / circle marker on the image.

nodes.label: Draw Text
nodes.description: Renders a text string on the image.

nodes.label: Draw Contours
nodes.description: Renders contour outlines from a contours list onto the image.

nodes.label: Number
nodes.description: Constant numeric value.

nodes.label: Add
nodes.description: Adds two values (a + b).

nodes.label: Subtract
nodes.description: Subtracts b from a (a - b).

nodes.label: Multiply
nodes.description: Multiplies two values (a × b).

nodes.label: Divide
nodes.description: Divides a by b.

nodes.label: Modulo
nodes.description: Returns the remainder of a / b.

nodes.label: Min
nodes.description: Returns the smaller of two values.

nodes.label: Max
nodes.description: Returns the larger of two values.

nodes.label: Power
nodes.description: Calculates a raised to the power of b.

nodes.label: Absolute
nodes.description: Returns the absolute value.

nodes.label: Round
nodes.description: Rounds to the nearest integer.

nodes.label: Sin
nodes.description: Sine of an angle in radians.

nodes.label: Cos
nodes.description: Cosine of an angle in radians.

nodes.label: Clamp
nodes.description: Constrains a value between min and max.

nodes.label: Distance
nodes.description: Euclidean distance between two points.

nodes.label: 3D → Screen
nodes.description: Projects a 3D point onto 2D screen coordinates.

nodes.label: Gaze → Screen
nodes.description: Maps a yaw/pitch gaze direction to normalized screen coordinates.

nodes.label: Math Op
nodes.description: Configurable binary math operation (add, mul, pow…).

nodes.label: Clock
nodes.description: Generates a periodic clock signal.

nodes.label: Signal Generator
nodes.description: Generates synthetic waveforms (sine, square, sawtooth…).

nodes.label: Moving Average
nodes.description: Smoothes a signal using a sliding window mean.

nodes.label: Exp. Smoothing
nodes.description: Exponential moving average (EMA).

nodes.label: Kalman Filter
nodes.description: Optimal state estimator for noisy measurements.

nodes.label: Low-pass Filter
nodes.description: Attenuates high-frequency components.

nodes.label: Gaussian Smooth
nodes.description: Gaussian-weighted signal smoother.

nodes.label: Median Filter
nodes.description: Robust median-based signal smoother.

nodes.label: Savitzky-Golay
nodes.description: Polynomial-fit smoothing filter (Savitzky-Golay).

nodes.label: Holt Smoothing
nodes.description: Double exponential (Holt) trend-tracking smoother.

nodes.label: LOESS Smoother
nodes.description: Locally-weighted polynomial regression smoother.

nodes.label: Particle Filter
nodes.description: Bayesian state estimation via sequential Monte Carlo.

nodes.label: FFT
nodes.description: Fast Fourier Transform — frequency spectrum of a signal or image.

params.label: Scientific Range
params.description: Keeps relative intensities instead of normalizing 0-255

nodes.label: Inverse FFT
nodes.description: Reconstructs signal from frequency domain.

params.label: Inverse Log
params.description: Undo log(x+1) on magnitude image input. Not needed for magnitude_raw.

nodes.label: String Input
nodes.description: Manual text entry for logic and display.

nodes.label: Concatenate
nodes.description: Joins two strings with a separator.

nodes.label: Search & Replace
nodes.description: Finds and replaces text. Supports regex.

nodes.label: Split
nodes.description: Splits a string into a list via a separator.

nodes.label: Length
nodes.description: Counts the number of characters.

nodes.label: Case Change
nodes.description: Converts to Upper or Lower case.

nodes.label: OCR (EasyOCR)
nodes.description: Extracts text from an image using EasyOCR.

nodes.label: OCR (Tesseract)
nodes.description: Extracts text from an image using Tesseract.

nodes.label: EAST Detector
nodes.description: Detects text regions using the EAST model.

nodes.label: ORB Detector
nodes.description: Fast oriented keypoint detector and descriptor (ORB).

nodes.label: SIFT Detector
nodes.description: Scale-invariant feature transform keypoints (SIFT).

nodes.label: FAST Corners
nodes.description: High-speed corner detector (FAST).

nodes.label: Harris Corners
nodes.description: Classic Harris corner response detector.

nodes.label: Hough Circles
nodes.description: Detects circular shapes via Hough transform.

nodes.label: Hough Lines
nodes.description: Detects straight line segments via Hough transform.

nodes.label: Find Contours
nodes.description: Detects and extracts isolated shapes from a binary mask.

nodes.label: Fill Contours
nodes.description: Fills all contours from a list into a binary mask.

nodes.label: Filter Contours
nodes.description: Filters contours by elongation ratio and/or area range.

nodes.label: Watershed
nodes.description: Marker-based watershed segmentation.

nodes.label: Connected Components
nodes.description: Labels connected regions in a binary mask.

nodes.label: Distance Transform
nodes.description: Computes distance from each pixel to nearest background.

nodes.label: AI Segmenter
nodes.description: Zero-shot instance segmentation using FastSAM.

nodes.label: Segmenter
nodes.description: General-purpose multi-method image segmenter.

nodes.label: Visual Size Gate
nodes.description: Filters segmented objects by size with interactive preview.

nodes.label: Shape Gate
nodes.description: Filters connected regions by shape compactness (aspect ratio and circularity).

nodes.label: Connected Comp. (CV2)
nodes.description: Labels connected regions — OpenCV implementation.

nodes.label: Contour Properties
nodes.description: Measures area, perimeter and bounding box of each contour.

nodes.label: Advanced Morphology
nodes.description: Extended morphological operations (top-hat, skeleton, etc.).

nodes.label: Advanced Threshold
nodes.description: Multi-method thresholding (Otsu, adaptive, multi-level).

nodes.label: Seeds from Boundaries
nodes.description: Generates watershed seeds from boundary detection.

nodes.label: Marker Filter
nodes.description: Filters a labeled marker map by region attributes.

nodes.label: Feature Matcher
nodes.description: Matches keypoints between two images (BF or FLANN).

nodes.label: SAM Segmenter
nodes.description: Segment Anything Model — prompt-driven instance segmentation.

params.label: Hugging Face Token (leave empty if saved)

nodes.label: SAM Depth-Guided
nodes.description: Combines depth map with SAM for guided segmentation.

nodes.label: BG Subtraction
nodes.description: Background subtraction with configurable learning rate.

nodes.label: Object Extractor
nodes.description: Normalises any segmentation output (mask, circles, polygons) into a labeled map, count, and per-object stats.

nodes.label: Optical Flow
nodes.description: Analyzes pixel movement between frames (Lucas-Kanade / Farneback).

nodes.label: Background Subtractor (MOG2)
nodes.description: Gaussian mixture model background subtraction.

nodes.label: Background Subtractor (KNN)
nodes.description: K-nearest-neighbours background subtraction.

nodes.label: Object Tracker (SORT)
nodes.description: Multi-object tracking using SORT algorithm.

nodes.label: Object Tracker (DeepSORT)
nodes.description: Multi-object tracking with appearance features (DeepSORT).

nodes.label: Point Tracker
nodes.description: Tracks a single point across frames.

nodes.label: Line Tracker
nodes.description: Tracks a line segment across frames.

nodes.label: Polygon Tracker
nodes.description: Tracks a polygon region across frames.

nodes.label: Histogram
nodes.description: Computes and displays pixel intensity distribution.

nodes.label: Statistics
nodes.description: Computes descriptive statistics on a data stream.

nodes.label: Area Statistics
nodes.description: Measures statistics within a region of interest.

nodes.label: Region Properties
nodes.description: Extracts shape properties from labeled regions (area, perimeter…).

nodes.label: Region Color Stats
nodes.description: Computes color statistics per segmented region.

nodes.label: Region Analysis
nodes.description: Computes per-region statistics from a labeled map.

nodes.label: Region Filter
nodes.description: Filters labeled regions by area, circularity, or other metrics.

nodes.label: Visual Calibration
nodes.description: Calculates a calibration factor by drawing a line of known length.

nodes.label: Unit Calibration
nodes.description: Converts pixel measurements into real-world units.

nodes.label: Ruler
nodes.description: Interactive visual ruler with real-world calibration.

nodes.label: Scale Bar
nodes.description: Renders a calibrated scale bar on the image.

nodes.label: Value Gate
nodes.description: Passes or blocks a value based on a numeric range.

nodes.label: Region Classifier
nodes.description: Classifies labeled regions by feature thresholds into named classes.

nodes.label: Focus Metric
nodes.description: Computes a sharpness / focus score for the image.

nodes.label: Frame Accumulator
nodes.description: Accumulates frames over time (mean, max, or sum).

nodes.label: Line Profile
nodes.description: Extracts pixel intensity along a drawn line.

nodes.label: Spectral Gain
nodes.description: Amplifies or attenuates specific frequency bands.

nodes.label: Analysis Report
nodes.description: Generates a structured text report from measurement data.

nodes.label: Mask Statistics
nodes.description: Computes area (px and %), center of gravity, and bounding box from a binary mask. Supports intensity-weighted centroid.

nodes.label: Footprint Forensics
nodes.description: Full footwear analysis: pressure zones, asymmetry score, and Staheli arch index. Connect geom_obb rotated outputs.

nodes.label: Export Particles
nodes.description: Saves particle/region measurements to a file.

nodes.label: K-Means (List)
nodes.description: Clusters a list of values into k groups.

nodes.label: Cluster Heatmap
nodes.description: Visualizes cluster assignments as a heatmap.

nodes.label: Matrix Distance
nodes.description: Computes pairwise distance matrix between feature vectors.

nodes.label: Inspector
nodes.description: Displays the raw data content flowing through a link.

nodes.label: Monitor
nodes.description: Polyvalent measurement display (flux, area, brightness, count).

nodes.label: Flow Visualizer
nodes.description: Colorized visualization of motion direction and strength.

nodes.label: Plotter
nodes.description: Multi-series real-time graph.

nodes.label: Plotter Pro
nodes.description: Dual-series graph with filtering, thresholding, and peak detection.

nodes.label: Density Heatmap
nodes.description: Accumulates point detections into a density heatmap.

nodes.label: Phase Dashboard
nodes.description: Visualizes phase-space / IMU signal dynamics.

nodes.label: Phase Space
nodes.description: Plots signal derivative vs. signal (phase-space portrait).

nodes.label: Tracker Visualizer
nodes.description: Renders tracked object trails and bounding boxes.

nodes.label: List Selector
nodes.description: Extracts a specific item from a list of detections.

nodes.label: Region Selector
nodes.description: Filters, sorts and selects a detection region.

nodes.label: Coord Splitter
nodes.description: Splits a coordinate dictionary into 4 scalar values.

nodes.label: Coord Combine
nodes.description: Combines 4 scalar values into a coordinate dictionary.

nodes.label: Landmark Selector
nodes.description: Extracts specific points from a landmark list.

nodes.label: List Aggregator
nodes.description: Aggregates a list of values (sum, mean, concat).

nodes.label: Dict Get
nodes.description: Extracts a value from a dictionary by key.

nodes.label: Group Dicts
nodes.description: Groups a list of dicts by a shared key.

nodes.label: Dict Merge
nodes.description: Merges two dictionaries into one.

nodes.label: On Each
nodes.description: Applies a node operation to every element of a list.

nodes.label: Python Node

params.label: Python Script
params.default:
# Logic here
# Inputs: a, b, c, d
# State persistant entre frames: state['my_var']
# Outputs: out_main, out_scalar, out_list, out_dict, out_any

out_main = a if isinstance(a, np.ndarray) else None
out_scalar = 0.0
out_list = []
out_dict = {}
out_any = None

nodes.description: Run custom Python scripts with dynamic inputs.

nodes.label: Mask Point Query
nodes.description: Checks if a point (x, y) falls within a mask.

nodes.label: Snapshot
nodes.description: Captures a still frame from the pipeline.

nodes.label: CSV Export
nodes.description: Exports data to a CSV file with persistent column mapping.

nodes.label: Fill Holes
nodes.description: Fills enclosed holes in a binary mask.

nodes.label: Remove Vignette
nodes.description: Corrects peripheral darkening (vignette effect) in an image.

nodes.label: Compare
nodes.description: Compares two values with =, ≠, <, >, ≤, ≥.

nodes.label: Logic Gate
nodes.description: AND, OR, NOT, XOR boolean gate on two signals.

nodes.label: Switch
nodes.description: Routes signal A or B based on a boolean condition.

nodes.label: Presence
nodes.description: Outputs a boolean indicating whether an input is present.

nodes.label: Collect
nodes.description: Collects multiple values into a list.

nodes.label: Filter Label
nodes.description: Passes through data only when a label condition is met.

nodes.label: Coord Center
nodes.description: Computes the center point of a bounding box.

nodes.label: Serial Reader
nodes.description: Reads data from a serial port (UART / COM).

nodes.label: EVM (Color)
nodes.description: Eulerian video magnification — amplifies color changes.

nodes.label: EVM (Motion)
nodes.description: Eulerian video magnification — amplifies subtle motion.

nodes.label: Merge Points
nodes.description: Merges multiple point lists into a single list.

nodes.label: YOLO Detector
nodes.description: Object detection using YOLO (v8 / v11).

nodes.label: Manual Points (Analysis)
nodes.description: Defines reference points for analysis workflows.

nodes.label: Float Image
nodes.description: Loads a 32-bit floating-point image (HDR, TIFF).

nodes.label: Face Tracker
nodes.description: Detects and tracks faces and facial landmarks (MediaPipe).

nodes.label: Hand Tracker
nodes.description: Detects and tracks hands and joints (MediaPipe).

nodes.label: Pose Tracker
nodes.description: Analyzes and tracks human body posture via MediaPipe.

nodes.label: Head Pose
nodes.description: Estimates 3D head orientation (yaw, pitch, roll).

nodes.label: Gaze Estimator
nodes.description: Estimates gaze direction (yaw/pitch) via L2CS-Net.

nodes.label: Eye Crop
nodes.description: Crops and aligns eye regions from facial landmarks.

nodes.label: Object Detector (MP)
nodes.description: Detects objects using MediaPipe Object Detection.

nodes.label: Depth Estimation
nodes.description: Estimates monocular depth using DepthAnything v2.

nodes.label: Waveform View
nodes.description: Renders the audio waveform as an image.

nodes.label: Audio to Spectro
nodes.description: Converts audio into a log-mel spectrogram image.

nodes.label: Spectro to Audio
nodes.description: Reconstructs audio from a spectrogram via Griffin-Lim.

nodes.label: Freq Filter
nodes.description: Low-pass / High-pass / Band-pass / Band-stop IIR filter.

nodes.label: Pitch Shift
nodes.description: Shifts pitch by N semitones without changing duration.

nodes.label: Time Stretch
nodes.description: Stretches or compresses duration without changing pitch.

nodes.label: Audio Info
nodes.description: Computes RMS, peak amplitude, zero-crossing rate.

nodes.label: Audio Export
nodes.description: Saves audio to a .wav file on disk.

nodes.label: Speaker Out
nodes.description: Plays audio through system speakers.

nodes.label: GeoTIFF Reader
nodes.description: Loads a GeoTIFF satellite or raster file.

nodes.label: GeoTIFF Writer
nodes.description: Saves raster data as a GeoTIFF file.

nodes.label: Band Selector
nodes.description: Selects a specific spectral band from a multi-band raster.

nodes.label: Band Info
nodes.description: Displays metadata about raster bands.

nodes.label: Band Calculator
nodes.description: Computes a new band from per-pixel arithmetic.

nodes.label: Band Statistics
nodes.description: Computes statistics on a raster band.

nodes.label: Spectral Index
nodes.description: Computes standard spectral indices (NDVI, NDWI…).

nodes.label: DN Normalize
nodes.description: Normalizes digital numbers to top-of-atmosphere reflectance.

nodes.label: Deglint
nodes.description: Removes sun-glint from water-surface satellite imagery.

nodes.label: Earth Engine
nodes.description: Fetches imagery from Google Earth Engine.

params.label: GCP Project ID (leave empty if saved)

nodes.label: Sentinel-2 Loader
nodes.description: Loads a Sentinel-2 scene from disk.

nodes.label: Land Cover
nodes.description: Classifies land-cover type from spectral data.

nodes.label: Geo Mask
nodes.description: Creates a mask from geographic features or bands.

nodes.label: Geo Statistics
nodes.description: Computes zonal statistics over a geographic area.

nodes.label: Turbidity (Nechad)
nodes.description: Estimates water turbidity using the Nechad algorithm.

nodes.label: Turbidity Stats
nodes.description: Computes turbidity statistics across a scene.

nodes.label: Water Mask (MNDWI)
nodes.description: Extracts a water mask using the MNDWI index.

nodes.label: NDWI
nodes.description: Normalized Difference Water Index.

nodes.label: Spectral Index
nodes.description: Generic spectral index calculator.

nodes.label: Water Refine
nodes.description: Post-processes a water mask for accuracy.

nodes.label: Grain Segmenter
nodes.description: Segments mineral grains in thin-section images.

nodes.label: Grain Markers
nodes.description: Generates watershed markers for grain separation.

nodes.label: Grain Statistics
nodes.description: Computes size and shape statistics per grain.

nodes.label: Grain Histogram
nodes.description: Plots grain size distribution histogram.

nodes.label: Grain Report
nodes.description: Generates a petrographic grain analysis report.

nodes.label: Color Segmenter
nodes.description: Segments minerals by color (HSV ranges).

nodes.label: Mineral Key
nodes.description: Maps color labels to mineral names.

nodes.label: Opaque Detector
nodes.description: Detects opaque minerals in transmitted-light images.

nodes.label: Petrography Report
nodes.description: Renders a petrographic classification table.

nodes.label: Thin Section Report
nodes.description: Full petrographic report for a thin-section slide.

nodes.label: Sediment Loader
nodes.description: Loads sediment sample data for analysis.

nodes.label: Geo Index
nodes.description: Computes a geology-specific spectral or spatial index.

nodes.label: Petro Grain Separator
nodes.description: Separates touching grains using distance transform.

nodes.label: Neighbor Analysis
nodes.description: Analyzes grain contacts and neighbor relationships.

nodes.label: Point Counter
nodes.description: Grid-based modal point counting for petrography.

nodes.label: SAM Grain Stats
nodes.description: Computes grain statistics from SAM segmentation output.

nodes.label: Isolate Section
nodes.description: Isolates the root cross-section from background.

nodes.label: Calibrate
nodes.description: Sets the µm/pixel scale for root measurements.

nodes.label: Segment Stele
nodes.description: Segments the stele (central cylinder) of the root.

nodes.label: Root Layers
nodes.description: Delineates anatomical tissue layers (epidermis, cortex…).

nodes.label: Cortex Areas
nodes.description: Measures cortex cell areas and layer thickness.

nodes.label: Cortical Cells
nodes.description: Counts and characterizes cortical cell files.

nodes.label: Aerenchyma
nodes.description: Detects aerenchyma (air spaces) in cortex tissue.

nodes.label: Protoxylem
nodes.description: Localizes protoxylem poles in the stele.

nodes.label: Xylem Detect
nodes.description: Detects xylem vessels by size and shape.

nodes.label: Exclude Lateral
nodes.description: Removes lateral root primordium regions from analysis.

nodes.label: Anatomy Overlay
nodes.description: Renders labeled anatomy zones on the root image.

nodes.label: Anatomy Report
nodes.description: Generates a quantitative root anatomy report.

nodes.label: Quality Score
nodes.description: Scores image and segmentation quality for QC.

nodes.label: Blood Smear Segmenter
nodes.description: Segments blood smear images into cell regions.

nodes.label: Blood Cell Classifier
nodes.description: Classifies blood cells by type (RBC, WBC, platelets).

nodes.label: Hemogramme
nodes.description: Generates a CBC report (RBC, Neu, Lym, Mon, Plt) with biological interpretation.

nodes.label: Blood Report
nodes.description: Generates a structured hematology analysis report.

nodes.label: Reroute
nodes.description: Pass-through node to organize wires.
